sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15462" key="a)rrenikh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρρενική</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, and <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρρενικόν</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n15462.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀρσενικόν.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
